import torch
from collections import Counter
mhr_model = torch.jit.load\('C:/ComfyUI/models/sam3dbody/assets/mhr_model.pt', map_location='cpu'\)
jp = mhr_model.character_torch.skeleton.joint_parents.cpu\(\).numpy\(\)
lbs = mhr_model.character_torch.linear_blend_skinning
vi = lbs.vert_indices_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(int\)
si = lbs.skin_indices_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(int\)
sw = lbs.skin_weights_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(float\)
vert_best = {}
for v, j, w in zip\(vi, si, sw\):
    if v not in vert_best or w > vert_best[v][1]:
        vert_best[v] = \(j, w\)
jc = Counter\(j for j, w in vert_best.values\(\)\)

print\('=== Right arm chain \(38-73\) ==='\)
for j in range\(38, 74\):
    c = jc.get\(j, 0\)
    children = [ch for ch in range\(len\(jp\)\) if jp[ch] == j]
    if c > 0 or children:
        print\(f'  J{j:3d}: {c:4d} verts, parent={jp[j]:3d}, children={children}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Left arm chain \(74-109\) ==='\)
for j in range\(74, 110\):
    c = jc.get\(j, 0\)
    children = [ch for ch in range\(len\(jp\)\) if jp[ch] == j]
    if c > 0 or children:
        print\(f'  J{j:3d}: {c:4d} verts, parent={jp[j]:3d}, children={children}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/ComfyUI/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import torch, numpy as np
from collections import Counter

mhr_model = torch.jit.load\('C:/ComfyUI/models/sam3dbody/assets/mhr_model.pt', map_location='cpu'\)
jp = mhr_model.character_torch.skeleton.joint_parents.cpu\(\).numpy\(\)
lbs = mhr_model.character_torch.linear_blend_skinning
vi = lbs.vert_indices_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(int\)
si = lbs.skin_indices_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(int\)
sw = lbs.skin_weights_flattened.cpu\(\).numpy\(\).astype\(float\)

shape_p = torch.zeros\(1, 45\)
model_p = torch.zeros\(1, 204\)
expr_p = torch.zeros\(1, 72\)
verts, skel = mhr_model\(shape_p, model_p, expr_p\)
verts = verts[0].cpu\(\).numpy\(\) / 100

vert_best = {}
for v, j, w in zip\(vi, si, sw\):
    if v < len\(verts\):
        if v not in vert_best or w > vert_best[v][1]:
            vert_best[v] = \(j, w\)

jcoords = skel[0, :, :3].cpu\(\).numpy\(\) / 100
j36_pos = jcoords[36]
j37_pos = jcoords[37]
neck_axis = j37_pos - j36_pos
neck_len = np.linalg.norm\(neck_axis\)
neck_dir = neck_axis / max\(neck_len, 1e-6\)

collar_joints = {36, 37}
collar_verts = [v for v, \(j, w\) in vert_best.items\(\) if j in collar_joints]

y_min = min\(verts[v][1] for v in collar_verts\)
y_max = max\(verts[v][1] for v in collar_verts\)
n_bins = 20
bins = np.linspace\(y_min, y_max, n_bins + 1\)

print\('Y_center    count   avg_radial  max_radial  bar'\)
for i in range\(n_bins\):
    bin_verts = [v for v in collar_verts if bins[i] <= verts[v][1] < bins[i+1]]
    if not bin_verts:
        continue
    radials = []
    for v in bin_verts:
        offset = verts[v] - j36_pos
        proj = np.dot\(offset, neck_dir\)
        on_axis = j36_pos + proj * neck_dir
        radial = np.linalg.norm\(verts[v] - on_axis\)
        radials.append\(radial\)
    avg_r = np.mean\(radials\)
    max_r = np.max\(radials\)
    y_center = \(bins[i] + bins[i+1]\) / 2
    bar = '#' * int\(avg_r * 300\)
    print\('%.4f  %5d  %.4f      %.4f      %s' % \(y_center, len\(bin_verts\), avg_r, max_r, bar\)\)
" 2>&1)
